questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Indexing Pitfalls?
options: Inefficient scaling of Composite index ordering rules (index prefix rule).
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Composite index ordering rules (index prefix rule).
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Composite index ordering rules (index prefix rule) scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
